para.dtcname: Cursor or MAP Rotates when Vehicle Stopped

test1.ptxt: Check with the customer if the vehicle has been turned by a turntable.

specitem.ptxt: Vehicle has not been turned by turntable.

atten4.ptxt: If the vehicle is turned on a turntable with the ignition switch on (IG), the system may store the angular velocity. As a result, the vehicle position cursor may deviate.

testgrp.testtitle: TURN IGNITION SWITCH ON (IG) WHEN VEHICLE IS COMPLETELY STOPPED
PROCEED TO NEXT CIRCUIT INSPECTION SHOWN IN PROBLEM SYMPTOMS TABLE
